exercises.name: Pendulum Squat
exercises.note:
First set 8
Second  6
3rd 6
Added a 4th set and got 5. 

I didn't want to push too hard here. I'm traveling tomorrow so I left probably two reps in reserve for each of these.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.note: Same thing on hip thrusts. I didn't wanna give it 100%. Honestly I think my body's still a little tired from HIIT class on Saturday. My lower back is a little tight so I stayed at 180 lb and I got 12 all sets and stopped at the top plenty to activate the glutes.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.note: I got on set one, ten, set to 10, and set three. I did get twelve.

exercises.name: Walking Lunge (DB)
exercises.note: I dropped the weight to 30 lb dumbbells because I just felt like that was going to be better. I got all controlled reps and still felt a lot of activation.

exercises.name: Core Circuit (Back-Safe)
exercises.planned: Cable Crunch 66 lb × 12 → Dead Bugs 8–10/side → Side Plank 30s/side · 2 rounds
